title: When Love Is Kind.
content:
When Love is kind,
        Cheerful and free,
    Love's sure to find
        Welcome from me.

    But when Love brings
        Heartache or pang,
    Tears, and such things--
        Love may go hang!

    If Love can sigh
        For one alone,
    Well pleased am I
        To be that one,

    But should I see
        Love given to rove
    To two or three,
        Then--good by Love!

    Love must, in short,
        Keep fond and true,
    Thro' good report,
        And evil too.

    Else, here I swear,
        Young Love may go.
    For aught I care--
        To Jericho.
meaning:
"When Love Is Kind." is a quintessential example of Thomas Moore's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
